title: RelationshipType
text: RelationshipType Describes the relationship between two tables. Description The RelationshipType structure is used to describe a relationship. The relations of a table are described in lists of these structures. These lists are available through the RelationshipInfoType structure. Data type definitions are available in unidbm.h located in the UnifaceAPSInstallDir\uniface\3gl\include directory. Table 1. Elements Type Element Description unsigned char *RelationshipName Null-terminated name of the relationship (defined by the user). unsigned char *OneModelName Name of the application model in which the one entity resides. unsigned char *ManyModelName Name of the application model in which the many entity resides. unsigned char *RelatedEntityName Name of the related entity, as defined in the application model, that is, before entity assignment unsigned char *RelatedTableName Name of the related table after entity assignment. This name can contain the full operating system file name. The connector must parse the name, in the same way it does with uctrl->uname in modes 0, 1 and 2. int IsOverflow When IsOverflow has the value 1, it is a relation between a table and its overflow table. In other cases it has the value 0. int KeyNumber Uniface index number of the referenced key in the one table. KeyTypeType KeyType Type of referenced key in the one table. The used data type KeyTypeType has the following definition: typedef enum { PRIMARY_KEY, CANDIDATE_KEY } KeyTypeType; Copy int RIFields Number of fields in the foreign key and in the referenced key. int *RIFieldNumberList Array of RIFields field numbers. These identify the fields in the key (primary, candidate or foreign) of the current table in the relationship (that is, the table which is described by the current control block). unsigned char **RIFieldNameList Array of ‘RIFields’ pointers to null-terminated field names. These identify the fields in the key (primary, candidate or foreign) of the related table in the relationship (that is, the table which is not described by the current control block). ForeignKeyRuleType OnDelete The nature of the relation in respect to the delete constraint. The used data type ForeignKeyRuleType has the following definition: typedef enum { RESTRICT, CASCADE, NULLIFY } ForeignKeyRuleType; Copy Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
